mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(TRUNC(R.CURRENT_TIME), 'MM/DD') AS DAY_DATE, TO_CHAR(TRUNC(R.CURRENT_TIME), 'DY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=KOREAN') AS DAY, SUM(DISTANCE) AS DISTANCE_SUM, SUM(KILOWATT) AS KILOWATT_SUM FROM RASP R WHERE CURRENT_TIME >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 6 GROUP BY TRUNC(CURRENT_TIME) ORDER BY TRUNC(CURRENT_TIME)

SELECT TO_CHAR(TRUNC(R.CURRENT_TIME), 'MM/DD') AS DAY_DATE, TO_CHAR(TRUNC(R.CURRENT_TIME), 'DY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=KOREAN') AS DAY, SUM(R.DISTANCE) AS DISTANCE_SUM, SUM(R.KILOWATT) AS KILOWATT_SUM FROM RASP R JOIN CAR C ON R.CAR_NUM = C.CAR_NO JOIN BOARD B ON C.BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO WHERE B.USER_ID = #{userId} AND R.CURRENT_TIME BETWEEN C.START_TIME AND C.FINISH_TIME GROUP BY TRUNC(R.CURRENT_TIME) ORDER BY TRUNC(R.CURRENT_TIME)
